productDisplayName: Nike Women Running Black Skirt with Capris
description: Composition Black skirt with leggings attached inside made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, has an elasticated waistband, two insert pockets on the sides and brand logo above the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash cold at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Pamper your legs and give sporty looks a sophisticated touch with this skirt and leggings combination from nike. The polyester/spandex blend ensures that the leggings stay snug on your legs and protect you on your healthy daily run.
